response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced senior developer with a strong background in full-stack development, but his seniority and extensive expertise may exceed the requirements for this junior/mid-level role. While his skills align well with the technical stack (TypeScript, React, databases), his career trajectory suggests he may seek more senior responsibilities or higher compensation than this role offers.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, directly matching the required skills.
Proven track record in building scalable platforms and integrating diverse data sources, relevant to the role's responsibilities.
Strong open-source contributions and leadership in developer tooling, demonstrating initiative and deep technical knowledge.
concerns: Overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, which may lead to misaligned expectations or short tenure.
Limited explicit experience with PostgreSQL (preferred in the job description) and Nest.js, though related skills are present.
High on-site presence requirement may be a challenge due to current location (São Paulo) and potential relocation barriers.
